data.name: RETIREMENT_REQUEST_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The retirement request was not found.

data.name: RETIREMENT_REQUEST_EMPLOYEE_NOT_ELIGIBLE
data.value: The employee is not eligible for a retirement request (it must be an active, completed employee file without a retirement in force).

data.name: RETIREMENT_REQUEST_ALREADY_OPEN
data.value: The employee already has an open retirement request (SOLICITADA or AUTORIZADA).

data.name: RETIREMENT_REQUEST_REQUESTER_INVALID
data.value: The requester must reference a valid, active personnel file of the company.

data.name: RETIREMENT_REQUEST_DATE_INCOHERENT
data.value: The request date cannot be in the future, the retirement date cannot precede the hire date, and no active assignment or contract may start after the retirement date.

data.name: RETIREMENT_REQUEST_STATE_RULE_VIOLATION
data.value: The retirement request is not in a state that allows this operation.

data.name: RETIREMENT_RESOLUTION_TARGET_INVALID
data.value: The resolution target must be AUTORIZADA or RECHAZADA.

data.name: RETIREMENT_RESOLUTION_NOTES_REQUIRED
data.value: Rejecting a retirement request requires a note.

data.name: RETIREMENT_SELF_ACTION_FORBIDDEN
data.value: The subject employee cannot authorize, execute or revert their own retirement.

data.name: RETIREMENT_REQUESTER_CANNOT_AUTHORIZE
data.value: The requester of a retirement cannot authorize it (separation of duties).

data.name: RETIREMENT_EXECUTION_DATE_NOT_REACHED
data.value: The retirement cannot be executed before its retirement date.

data.name: RETIREMENT_EXECUTION_STATE_CONFLICT
data.value: The employee's profile no longer matches an executable state (it may have been retired or modified by another operation).

data.name: RETIREMENT_LAST_ADMIN_CONFLICT
data.value: The employee is the company's last active administrator; transfer the administration before executing the retirement.

data.name: RETIREMENT_REVERSAL_REASON_REQUIRED
data.value: Reverting a retirement requires a reason.

data.name: RETIREMENT_REVERSAL_WINDOW_EXPIRED
data.value: The 30-day reversal window since the execution has expired; use a rehire to reincorporate the employee.

data.name: RETIREMENT_REVERSAL_BLOCKED_BY_REHIRE
data.value: The retirement cannot be reverted because the employee was rehired after the execution.

data.name: RETIREMENT_REVERSAL_STATE_DIVERGED
data.value: The employee's current state no longer matches what the execution left; the reversal was blocked to avoid restoring over modified data.

data.name: RETIREMENT_REVERSAL_NOT_MOST_RECENT
data.value: Only the employee's most recent executed retirement can be reverted.

data.name: EMPLOYMENT_STATUS_RETIRADO_RESERVED
data.value: The employment information of a retired employee is managed by the retirement module (reversal or rehire); the RETIRADO status is reserved to its execution.

data.name: SETTLEMENT_NOT_FOUND

data.name: SETTLEMENT_LINE_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The settlement line does not exist.

data.name: SETTLEMENT_STATE_RULE_VIOLATION
data.value: The operation is not valid for the settlement's current state (only a BORRADOR settlement or a scenario is editable; a real settlement is annulled, never deleted).

data.name: SETTLEMENT_SCENARIO_EMPLOYEE_RETIRED
data.value: A scenario simulates over an active employee; a retired employee gets a real settlement anchored to the executed retirement.

data.name: SETTLEMENT_POSITION_INVALID
data.value: The assigned position (plaza) does not belong to the personnel file or is not valid for this settlement kind.

data.name: SETTLEMENT_BASE_SALARY_MISSING
data.value: The plaza has no active negotiated base salary (SALARIO_BASE); configure the compensation before settling.

data.name: SETTLEMENT_MINIMUM_WAGE_MISSING
data.value: The employee's record has no applicable minimum monthly wage; register it on the employment information or supply it in the settlement.

data.name: SETTLEMENT_REQUESTER_NOT_HR
data.value: The settlement requester can only be a member of HR (the registering manager by default).

data.name: SETTLEMENT_SELF_ACTION_FORBIDDEN
data.value: The subject employee cannot manage their own settlement.

data.name: SETTLEMENT_DATE_INCOHERENT
data.value: The request date cannot be in the future and the retirement date cannot precede the plaza start date.

data.name: SETTLEMENT_CONCEPT_INVALID
data.value: The settlement concept is not an active manual concept of the catalog for this section.

data.name: SETTLEMENT_OVERRIDE_NOTE_REQUIRED
data.value: A manual override requires a reason note.

data.name: SETTLEMENT_RETIREMENT_NOT_EXECUTED
data.value: A real settlement requires an EXECUTED retirement of the employee; simulate with a scenario instead.

data.name: SETTLEMENT_RETIREMENT_REVERTED
data.value: The employee's retirement was reverted — it never took effect, so it cannot be settled.

data.name: SETTLEMENT_POSITION_NOT_IN_RETIREMENT
data.value: The plaza is not one of the assignments closed by the employee's executed retirement.

data.name: SETTLEMENT_ALREADY_EXISTS_FOR_POSITION

data.name: OVERTIME_APPLICATION_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The active application was not found on this overtime record.

data.name: OVERTIME_APPLICATION_PAYROLL_PERIOD_INVALID
data.value: The payroll period is not a valid active period for the company.

data.name: OVERTIME_APPLY_PERIOD_CONFLICT
data.value: The apply-period batch could not be completed because of a conflicting overtime record: {0}.

data.name: OVERTIME_PAYROLL_INPUT_FILTER_REQUIRED
data.value: A payroll type and a payroll period are required to export the overtime payroll input.

data.name: RECURRING_DEDUCTION_SEGMENTS_REQUIRED
data.value: A credit without compound interest requires at least one plan segment.

data.name: RECURRING_DEDUCTION_SEGMENTS_WITH_INTEREST
data.value: A compound-interest credit derives its plan and cannot carry segments.

data.name: RECURRING_DEDUCTION_SEGMENT_VALUE_INVALID
data.value: The segment installment value must be greater than zero.

data.name: RECURRING_DEDUCTION_SEGMENT_RANGE_INVALID
data.value: The segment installment range is not valid.

data.name: RECURRING_DEDUCTION_SEGMENTS_NOT_CONTIGUOUS
data.value: The plan segments must be contiguous from installment one, with no gaps or overlaps.

data.name: RECURRING_DEDUCTION_SEGMENTS_INDEFINITE_SHAPE
data.value: An indefinite plan must end in a single open segment.

data.name: RECURRING_DEDUCTION_SEGMENTS_FINITE_SHAPE
data.value: A finite plan cannot end in an open segment.

data.name: RECURRING_DEDUCTION_INTEREST_INDEFINITE
data.value: A compound-interest credit requires a finite plan.

data.name: RECURRING_DEDUCTION_INTEREST_PRINCIPAL_INVALID
data.value: The principal amount is not valid for the selected interest mode.

data.name: RECURRING_DEDUCTION_INTEREST_RATE_INVALID
data.value: The interest rate must be greater than zero.

data.name: RECURRING_DEDUCTION_INTEREST_COUNT_INVALID
data.value: A compound-interest credit requires at least one planned installment.

data.name: RECURRING_DEDUCTION_INTEREST_NOT_AMORTIZABLE
data.value: The credit cannot be amortized with the supplied principal, rate and installment count.

data.name: RECURRING_DEDUCTION_SETTLEMENT_ACTION_INDEFINITE
data.value: An indefinite credit has no balance to discount at settlement; use CANCELAR.

data.name: RECURRING_DEDUCTION_INSTALLMENT_NOT_APPLICABLE
data.value: Only a VIGENTE recurring deduction can apply installments.

data.name: RECURRING_DEDUCTION_INSTALLMENT_SEQUENCE_INVALID
data.value: The installment number must be the next expected one in the plan sequence.

data.name: RECURRING_DEDUCTION_INSTALLMENT_EXCEEDS_PLAN
data.value: The installment number cannot exceed the planned installment count.

data.name: RECURRING_DEDUCTION_INSTALLMENT_NOT_DUE_YET
data.value: The credit's effective date has not been reached yet.

data.name: RECURRING_DEDUCTION_EXTRAORDINARY_NOT_APPLICABLE
data.value: Only a VIGENTE recurring deduction can take an extraordinary payment.

data.name: RECURRING_DEDUCTION_EXTRAORDINARY_EXCEEDS_BALANCE
data.value: The extraordinary payment cannot exceed the outstanding balance.

data.name: RECURRING_DEDUCTION_EXTRAORDINARY_INDEFINITE
data.value: An indefinite credit has no balance to pay off ahead of time.

data.name: RECURRING_DEDUCTION_APPLICATION_FREQUENCY_INVALID
data.value: The application frequency must divide the installment frequency.

data.name: RECURRING_DEDUCTION_TYPE_INVALID
data.value: The recurring-deduction type is not valid for the active catalog.

data.name: RECURRING_DEDUCTION_CONCEPT_INVALID
data.value: The compensation concept is not a valid active non-statutory deduction concept for the company's country.

data.name: RECURRING_DEDUCTION_FINANCIAL_INSTITUTION_REQUIRED
data.value: The financial institution is required for an external deduction concept.

data.name: RECURRING_DEDUCTION_PAYROLL_TYPE_INVALID
data.value: The payroll type is not valid for the active catalog.

data.name: RECURRING_DEDUCTION_FREQUENCY_INVALID
data.value: The installment or application frequency is not valid for the active pay-period catalog.

data.name: RECURRING_DEDUCTION_ASSIGNED_POSITION_INVALID
data.value: The assigned position is not a valid plaza of this employee.

data.name: RECURRING_DEDUCTION_STATUS_INVALID
data.value: The target status is not a valid resolution target for the active catalog.

data.name: RECURRING_DEDUCTION_DECISION_NOTE_REQUIRED
data.value: A decision note is required to reject a recurring deduction.

data.name: RECURRING_DEDUCTION_ANNULMENT_REASON_REQUIRED
data.value: An annulment reason is required.

data.name: RECURRING_DEDUCTION_CLOSURE_REASON_REQUIRED
data.value: A closure reason is required to close a recurring deduction manually.

data.name: RECURRING_DEDUCTION_STATE_RULE_VIOLATION
data.value: The recurring deduction is not in a state that allows this operation.

data.name: RECURRING_DEDUCTION_SELF_APPROVAL_FORBIDDEN
data.value: The subject employee or the registrar cannot decide or revoke the recurring deduction.

data.name: validation.message.frominstallment_must_be_greater_than_or_equal_to_one
data.value: FromInstallment must be greater than or equal to one.

data.name: validation.message.toinstallment_cannot_precede_frominstallment
data.value: ToInstallment cannot precede FromInstallment.

data.name: validation.message.exceptionmonths_must_contain_month_numbers_between_1_and_12
data.value: ExceptionMonths must contain month numbers between 1 and 12.

data.name: validation.message.principalamount_is_required_and_must_be_greater_than_zero_for_a_compound_interest_credit
data.value: PrincipalAmount is required and must be greater than zero for a compound-interest credit.

data.name: validation.message.interestratepercent_is_required_and_must_be_in_0_100_for_a_compound_interest_credit
data.value: InterestRatePercent is required and must be in (0, 100] for a compound-interest credit.

data.name: validation.message.plannedinstallments_is_required_and_must_be_greater_than_zero_for_a_compound_interest_credit
data.value: PlannedInstallments is required and must be greater than zero for a compound-interest credit.

data.name: validation.message.principalamount_is_only_valid_on_a_compound_interest_credit
data.value: PrincipalAmount is only valid on a compound-interest credit.

data.name: validation.message.interestratepercent_is_only_valid_on_a_compound_interest_credit
data.value: InterestRatePercent is only valid on a compound-interest credit.

data.name: validation.message.plannedinstallments_is_only_valid_on_a_compound_interest_credit
data.value: PlannedInstallments is only valid on a compound-interest credit.

data.name: validation.message.segments_are_required_for_a_credit_without_compound_interest
data.value: Segments are required for a credit without compound interest.

data.name: validation.message.a_compound_interest_credit_derives_its_plan_and_cannot_carry_segments
data.value: A compound-interest credit derives its plan and cannot carry segments.

data.name: validation.message.settlementactioncode_must_be_descontar_saldo_or_cancelar
data.value: SettlementActionCode must be DESCONTAR_SALDO or CANCELAR.

data.name: RECURRING_DEDUCTION_INSTALLMENT_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The installment was not found on this recurring deduction.

data.name: RECURRING_DEDUCTION_INSTALLMENT_PAYROLL_PERIOD_INVALID
data.value: The payroll period is not a valid active period for the company.

data.name: RECURRING_DEDUCTION_INSTALLMENT_ANNULMENT_REASON_REQUIRED
data.value: An annulment reason is required to annul an installment.

data.name: RECURRING_DEDUCTION_INSTALLMENT_PLAN_COMPLETE
data.value: The installment plan is already complete; there are no more installments to apply.

data.name: RECURRING_DEDUCTION_APPLY_PERIOD_CONFLICT
data.value: The apply-period batch was rolled back because of a conflict.

data.name: validation.message.the_extraordinary_payment_must_be_greater_than_zero
data.value: The extraordinary payment must be greater than zero.

data.name: validation.message.the_apply_period_batch_requires_either_a_payroll_period_or_a_cutoff_date
data.value: The apply-period batch requires either a payroll period or a cutoff date.

data.value: The payroll-input export requires both a start date and an end date.

data.value: The value components are not valid for the selected calculation method.

data.name: ONE_TIME_DEDUCTION_VALUE_FIXED_WITH_COMPONENTS
data.value: A fixed-value deduction cannot carry a calculation method or components.

data.name: ONE_TIME_DEDUCTION_VALUE_AMOUNT_INVALID
data.value: The amount must be greater than zero.

data.name: ONE_TIME_DEDUCTION_AMOUNT_MISMATCH
data.value: The declared amount does not match the amount computed from its components.

data.name: ONE_TIME_DEDUCTION_APPLICATION_NOT_REVERTIBLE

data.value: The one-time deduction is not in a state that allows this operation.

data.value: The compensation concept is not a valid active non-statutory deduction concept for the company's country.

data.value: The payroll period is not a valid active period for the company.

data.value: The subject employee, the requester or the registrar cannot decide or revoke the one-time deduction.

data.value: The payroll-input export requires both a start date and an end date.

data.value: A fixed-value deduction requires an amount.

data.name: ONE_TIME_DEDUCTION_APPLICATION_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The application was not found on this one-time deduction.

data.value: An annulment reason is required to revert an application.

data.value: The apply-period batch was rolled back because of a conflict.

data.value: The same recurring-deduction type cannot carry two indebtedness limits.

data.name: INDEBTEDNESS_LIMIT_EXCEEDED
data.value: The deduction would push the employee past the applicable indebtedness limit.

data.value: Another not-worked-time type already uses this code.

data.name: NOT_WORKED_TIME_HOURS_REQUIRED
